title: Lua API, animation, and site fixes
summary: Patch update for Lua scripting, avatar animation, relay stability, and UGC Labs routing.
changelog: Added more Lua API methods for camera control, input, raycasts, HUD/surface drawing, chat hooks, local world markers, and player visual overrides.
Added Lua examples for click-to-walk, interface scripting, and smooth camera collision.
Changed the default avatar animation pack to use more Vortex-like idle, walk, jump, and fall motion.
Fixed relay sessions disconnecting too quickly when the browser was AFK or in the background.
Fixed repeated reconnect messages flooding the in-game chat box.
Improved early UGC animation pack preview/equip support. Please report issues on GitHub.
Fixed UGC Labs rendering over the signed-out sign in / signup page.
